name: Medical
description: Clinically precise, trust-first template for healthcare professionals — designed for hospital credential submissions and peer referrals.

colors.accentNote: Red used ONLY for Active License badges — never decorative

designNotes: The Medical template deliberately suppresses every pattern that reads as trendy — no bold transforms, no staggered animations, no asymmetric layouts. DM Sans at heavier weights delivers authoritative density. Deep Medical Blue (#0f2942) grounds the page in institutional healthcare. Clinical Teal (#0891b2) appears only on interactive targets. Accent red (#ef4444) is rationed to one use case — active license status badges — giving it the weight of a certification stamp.
